items.prompt: A path that starts with / is…
items.explain: Leading slash means from the filesystem root — absolute.

items.prompt: A relative path is resolved against…
items.explain: Relative paths join to the current working directory (cwd).

items.prompt: cd .. moves up one directory using a relative path.
items.explain: Two dots means the parent of the current directory.

items.prompt: The tilde (~) in a path usually means…
items.explain: Tilde expands to the user’s home directory.
